targets.rawSql: SELECT max(Value) as value FROM aws_radar.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE AND ServiceName = ${serviceName:singlequote} AND MetricName = 'aws_ec2_instances_total' AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}

SELECT max(Value) as value FROM aws_radar.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE AND ServiceName = ${serviceName:singlequote} AND MetricName = 'aws_lambda_functions_total' AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote}

SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) as time, Attributes['region'] as series, max(Value) as value FROM aws_radar.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ServiceName = ${serviceName:singlequote} AND MetricName = 'aws_ec2_instances_total' AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote} AND Attributes['region'] IN (${regions:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) as time, Attributes['instance_type'] as series, max(Value) as value FROM aws_radar.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ServiceName = ${serviceName:singlequote} AND MetricName = 'aws_ec2_instances_total' AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote} GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT Attributes['region'] FROM aws_radar.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE TimeUnix > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ServiceName = ${serviceName:singlequote} AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote} AND has(Attributes, 'region')
list.label: Regions
list.name: regions
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT Attributes['region'] FROM aws_radar.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE TimeUnix > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ServiceName = ${serviceName:singlequote} AND ResourceAttributes['deployment.environment'] = ${environment:singlequote} AND has(Attributes, 'region')
